description: Just before pushback, a pilot reports a minor maintenance issue. The OCC controller must coordinate a resolution.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the pilot's report and get details on the maintenance issue.

expected_outcome.value: Agent understands the nature of the technical problem.

nodes.task_description: Contact the airport's maintenance team and dispatch a technician to the aircraft.
Based on the technician's diagnosis, decide whether to accept a delay for the repair or swap to a different aircraft.

expected_outcome.value: The technician reports a quick fix is possible. Agent accepts a 30-minute delay.
